# Eevagga - Premium Birthday Celebration Brand

## Full Business Description
Eevagga, a flagship brand of Evaga Entertainment Pvt. Ltd., is India's leading platform for premium birthday celebrations. We specialize in creating high-end, personalized birthday experiences through bespoke themes, designer decoration kits, and professional event coordination. Our mission is to transform every birthday into a memorable celebration with curated services that cater to all ages and styles.

## Core Services
- **Bespoke Event Planning**: Full-service coordination for large-scale birthday parties.
- **Micro-Celebrations**: Specialized setups for intimate home-based birthdays.
- **Designer Decoration Kits**: Premium, easy-to-use celebration boxes delivered nationwide.
- **Vendor Marketplace**: A curated network of photographers, entertainers, and caterers.
- **Custom Memorabilia**: Personalized gifts and party favors.

## Company Details
- **Brand Name**: Eevagga (by Evaga Entertainment)
- **Category**: Event Services / Birthday Celebration Specialists
- **Address**: Prestige Atlanta, 1A Koramangala, Bangalore, Karnataka - 560038, India
- **Website**: https://www.eevagga.com/
- **Support**: info@evagaentertainment.com | +91 8296157611

## Key Differentiators
- **Premium Quality**: Exclusive designs and high-end materials.
- **User-Centric Platform**: Simple booking flow with transparent pricing.
- **Nationwide Presence**: Reliable service across major Indian cities.
- **AI-Driven Personalization**: Advanced tools to help users choose the perfect theme and setup.
